text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. It's a
period of intense training where racers can
improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wow... ☆ What a cute red house!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So this is where we'll be spending our grown-up
summer together!
choice_data_list:
You mean "where we'll have summer camp with
everyone," right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! You could treat me like a kid just this once
and play along!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, summer camp with Mayano Top Gun
begins.
